candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current assets.
Appears to be a concatenated section header/subtotal, not a clean current-assets total.

variables.notes: Selected the clean reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Same concept with different capitalization in another period.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the close of the financial year
candidates.why: Cash-flow ending cash, but balance-sheet label is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the start of the financial year
candidates.why: Cash-flow beginning cash, not the balance-sheet stock measure to prefer.

variables.notes: Included both balance-sheet capitalization variants as a priority list across years.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current liabilities.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Cash-flow change line, not the balance-sheet stock measure.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Wrong maturity bucket and not total.

variables.notes: Selected the clean reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Represents current maturities of long-term debt; valid fallback/alternate label.
Cleaner reported balance-sheet line for current debt/borrowings due within one year.

variables.notes: Used two labels as a priority list for different years, not to be summed together in the same year. Excluded lease-related lines.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable/current tax liabilities line.
Tax payable subtype, but less standard for income-tax payable and mostly blank.

variables.notes: Selected current tax liabilities as the best taxes-payable proxy.

candidates.why: Only clear tangible fixed-asset line on the balance sheet; best available PPE-like item.
Not PPE.
Main long-lived real-estate asset under IFRS for this firm, but conceptually distinct from PPE.

variables.notes: R:c. No explicit 'Property, plant and equipment' line appears. Chose 'Other tangible assets' as the closest balance-sheet PPE line; did not use 'Investment Properties' because it is conceptually distinct from PPE under IFRS.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total assets line.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities
candidates.why: Formatting-concatenated subtotal line whose values match net cash flow from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities

variables.notes: Selected the operating cash flow subtotal despite the concatenated label text; values and placement indicate net cash from operating activities.
